name: nginx
description: Nginx (pronounced ``engine x'') is an HTTP and reverse proxy server, a mail proxy server, and a generic TCP/UDP proxy server.  It is known for its high performance, stability, rich feature set, simple configuration, and low resource consumption

options.name: -e
options.description: Use an alternative error log file.  Special value stderr indicates that the standard error output should be used

options.name: -p
options.description: Set the prefix path.  The default value is %%PREFIX%%

options.name: -q
options.description: Suppress non-error messages during configuration testing

options.name: -T
options.description: Same as -t, but additionally dump configuration files to standard output

options.name: -t
options.description: Do not run, just test the configuration file.  nginx checks the configuration file syntax and then tries to open files referenced in the configuration file

options.name: -V
options.description: Print the nginx version, compiler version, and configure script parameters

options.name: -s
options.description: Send a signal to the master process.  The argument signal can be one of: stop, quit, reopen, reload
